title: Horsemeat
description: A Mod that adds Horse Meat.
body: This lightweight mod lets horses drop Raw Horse Meat, which you can cook in a furnace or smoker into juicy Horse Steak. | Raw Horsemeat | Cooked Horsemeat | | ------------- | ----------------- | | ![Raw Horsemeat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4c45b63afc6c037b094cb7e44484216818f7144.png) | ![Cooked Horsemeat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b065c4137ad7a7f0025da2fa5d7071d2b61b0262.png) |
